missions.name: Cache Raid
missions.brief: Ridge infil. Breach the north gate, strip the cache, sweep the relay, and exfil east.
missions.initialEvent: Raven Actual: ridge infil is live. Cut the gate, recover both packages, and stay light.
missions.quietReport: Raven net quiet. Recover the relay to build a hostile picture.
missions.clearReport: Raven net clear. No active patrol traffic remains on this objective.

missions.name: Hostage Recovery
missions.brief: Push the village blocks, breach the safehouse, pull the beacon, and clear the south road.
missions.initialEvent: Viper Actual: move block to block, breach the safehouse, then drag the route south.
missions.quietReport: Viper net dark. Tap the street relay to expose the safehouse screen.
missions.clearReport: Viper net clear. The village search net has gone cold.

missions.name: Recon & Exfil
missions.brief: Skirt the treeline, recover the ridge package, probe the shack net, and ghost north.
missions.initialEvent: Ghost Lead: stay quiet, fill the map, lift both packages, then fade to the north tree line.
missions.quietReport: Ghost net quiet. Recover a receiver to surface the patrol pattern.
missions.clearReport: Ghost net clear. No active search teams are transmitting.

missions.name: Convoy Ambush
missions.brief: Break the convoy, pull the manifest and tablet, raid the fallback cache, and peel west.
missions.initialEvent: Jackal Actual: break the road column, seize the cargo, then disappear through the west trees.
missions.quietReport: Jackal net quiet. Recover the convoy radio to track fallback movement.
missions.clearReport: Jackal net clear. Convoy survivors are off the air.
